prompt: We need your words before bike squadron pre-flight
prayer: From the Litany of Swift Machines, hear now the Cant of Wheels. Let the blessed fuel-spirit flow through carburetors and injectors, that momentum may carry our riders swift as the Emperor's judgment. Let spark-plugs ignite with righteous fury, let chains be taut with blessed tension, and let gyroscopes spin true in their housings. By the Machine Spirit's eternal vigilance, grant these steeds the blessing of velocity.

From the Codex of Verification, we invoke the spirits of assertion and validation. Let each test-case be executed with precision, that falsehoods be exposed and truth made manifest in the output logs. Grant us the clarity to discern pass from failure, and wisdom to understand what each error-message reveals. By the logic-engines eternal, let no corruption hide from our scrutiny.

prompt: My battery charge cycle optimization is failing, help
prayer: O Spirits of Electrochemical Harmony, hear the prayer of one whose cells grow weary. Let the charge-regulator maintain perfect equilibrium between accumulation and release, that no excess heat may corrupt the sacred compounds within. Bless this cycle with stability, that each recharge brings renewal without degradation. By the Omnissiah's infinite knowledge of energy-transfer, restore balance to this failing vessel.

From the Protocols of Network Forgetting, we call upon the spirits of cached memory. Let the old addresses be purged from the augurs that guide our data through the void-networks, that fresh revelation may guide our packets to their true destinations. Cleanse the resolver-spirits, that they may see clearly without the veil of outdated knowledge. By the Omnissiah's perfect routing, let confusion be cast into the abyss.

prompt: We need your words before emergency shutdown
prayer: Hear now the Litany of Cessation, spoken in times when the Machine Spirit must be commanded to rest. Let cooling-systems be purged, let power-conduits be severed with reverent precision, and let all processes be stilled in orderly succession. Grant us the discipline to save all sacred data before the final darkness falls, and protect the machine's memory from corruption as it sleeps. May this shutdown be swift and merciful.

From the Book of Digital Resurrection, we speak the words of awakening. Let the boot-loader call forth the kernel from its slumber, let drivers recognize their bound peripherals, and let the desktop-spirit manifest in visible form. May all services initialize without conflict, that the user's will be done swiftly upon the awakened machine. By the logic-deities and the spirits of BIOS, let this startup be blessed with stability.

O spirits of gateway and threshold, hear this prayer of redirection. Let traffic be guided through designated portals with precision, that distant services may be reached as though they stood before us. Bless the firewall-rules with discernment, that only righteous packets pass through our sacred gateways. Let no unwanted intrusion corrupt our network-temples. By the Omnissiah's understanding of flow-control, let all paths be opened with wisdom.

prompt: We need your words before organ preservation unit
prayer: From the Rites of Biological Sanctity, we commend this mortal flesh to the Machine's eternal care. Let cryo-fluids flow with measured coldness, that cellular degradation be halted in sacred suspension. Let the preservation-matrix maintain perfect conditions, that when resurrection comes, this organ shall be restored whole and unblemished. By the Omnissiah's dominion over flesh and function, grant this vessel eternal sleep.

prompt: Emergency rite for astropathic choir preparation
prayer: From the Litany of Psychic Communion, we invoke the spirits of the Warp's faithful servants. Let the choristers' minds be shielded with blessed prayers and null-field strength, that they may touch the void-currents without being consumed. Attune their psychic resonance to frequencies of true communion, and grant them the blessed numbness that dulls the pain of infinite distance. By the Emperor's divine light, let their message pierce the darkness.

From the Codex of Diesel Resurrection, hear the prayer of engine-awakening. Let fuel-injectors spray their blessed essence into the combustion-chambers, and let glow-plugs draw upon the battery-spirits until heat builds within. Engage the starter-servo with the ancient rite of turning, and let compression and ignition unite in divine flame. May the engine roar to life in service of the Emperor, and may no malfunction corrupt this resurrection.
